name: firefox-translator
description: Firefox extension that translates pages in place with downloadable local language models.

scripts.test:build: esbuild src/content/main.ts src/content/skip-rules.ts src/content/walker.ts src/content/store.ts src/background/service-worker.ts src/background/tab-state.ts src/background/model-registry.ts --outdir=.tmp-tests --format=esm --platform=browser --target=es2022 --bundle
scripts.test: npm run test:build && node --test tests/unit/*.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/bergamot-smoke.mjs
